'''Novania''' was a major [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]].

==History==
Established on the planet [[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]] in the decades before the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]], the city of Novania was built around one of the planet's largest [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceports]]. Maintaining a population of around 2,000 the city was occupied not only by [[Arkanian/Legends|Arkanians]] but by many foreign visitors. Control of the spaceport was given to the [[Security Master]] who had access to information from across the planet. During the time of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Hyrim Focela]] held the title.<ref name="AC" />

{{City-stub}}
